message:
🐛 Fix Trestle card showing 0% when not in demo mode (#2568)

When logged in as a real user (not demo-user), the Trestle card correctly
detects isDemoData=true when no clusters have Trestle installed, but the
demo data generation path only ran when isDemoMode was true. This left
the card with empty statuses showing 0% scores and no profiles.

Now falls back to demo data after real cluster checks complete with no
Trestle installations found, matching the behavior of other cards.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
